message:
fix(web): add eslint-disable for SSR-safe localStorage access in security page

Add explanatory eslint-disable comment for the react-hooks/set-state-in-effect
rule in the security documentation page.

The setChecked call in useEffect is intentional and correct:
- localStorage access must happen client-side after component mount
- This pattern is required for SSR compatibility (Next.js)
- The saved checklist state cannot be read during server rendering

Also removes trailing newline at end of file.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
